_comments: Binds JSONType metadata to MJ: Remote Operations.Libraries so CodeGen emits a typed `LibrariesObject`
accessor conforming to Array<RemoteOperationLibrary>. Apply AFTER the v5.43
Remote_Operation_AI_Authoring migration + CodeGen have created the Libraries field on the
'MJ: Remote Operations' entity. If CodeGen names the entity/field differently, update the @lookup below.
Libraries field — strongly-typed array of { Library, ItemsUsed[] } the AI-authored body imports
